trust.notes: Bootstrapped from `README.md`, `CODEOWNERS`, and `SECURITY.md`. Maintainer information was imported from CODEOWNERS; `owners.team` is `@polarsource/engineering` because it is the clearest imported team signal, but `owners.maintainers` still preserves narrower owner candidates. SECURITY.md provided a policy or reporting URL rather than a direct mailbox, so `security_contact` preserves that URL. Left `repo.build` unset because `.github/workflows/copilot-setup-steps.yml` suggested an unsafe shell-like command. This is an overlay bootstrap, not a maintainer-controlled canonical record. Auto-promoted to verified: all fields are honestly resolved.
